data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Created docs/adr/0001-shim-sentinel-self-detection.md (ADR for architectural gate — shim sentinel self-detection). Created docs/reference/system-landscape.md (new Living Reference file covering: plugin root resolution order including step 3 sentinel, command wrappers marketplace-first behavior, portability lint with portability-ok suppression, agent fallback). Both files are in the correct tiers. Preparing CLAUDE.md suggested-change report next.
